title: SSC Selection Post Phase XIII 2025
age_limit: 18-30 years. Relaxation as per government norms.
pattern_table:
Subject|Questions|Marks
General Intelligence|25|50
General Awareness|25|50
Quantitative Aptitude|25|50
English Language|25|50
instructions: Apply online at ssc.gov.in. One-time registration (OTR) is mandatory.
selection_process: Computer Based Examination (CBE) followed by Skill Test (if applicable).
job_description: Staff Selection Commission (SSC) invites applications for various Selection Posts Phase XIII. This recruitment covers multiple departments in Central Government.

title: RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) 2025 Update
age_limit: 18-33 years. Age relaxation for reserved categories.
qualification: Matriculation / SSLC plus ITI from recognized institutions of NCVT/SCVT.
pattern_table:
Stage|Subject|Marks
CBT-1|Maths, Reasoning, Science, GA|75
CBT-2|Part A (Technical) & Part B|175
instructions: Medical standards for ALP are very strict. Candidates must have distance vision 6/6 without glasses.
selection_process: CBT-1, CBT-2, Computer Based Aptitude Test (CBAT), and Medical Exam.
job_description: Indian Railways is recruiting Assistant Loco Pilots. This is a technical role responsible for assisting in the operation of locomotives.

title: IBPS RRB Recruitment 2025 (Officers & Assistants)
age_limit: 18-30 years for Assistants, 18-40 years for Officers.
qualification: Bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognized University.
pattern_table:
Test|Medium|No. of Qs|Max Marks
Reasoning|Regional|40|40
Numerical Ability|Regional|40|40
instructions: Proficiency in the local language of the State is required for Office Assistant posts.
selection_process: Preliminary Exam, Main Exam, and Interview (for Officers).
job_description: IBPS conducts recruitment for Regional Rural Banks (RRBs). These banks serve the rural and semi-urban areas of India.

title: UPSC National Defence Academy (NDA) II 2025
age_limit: Only unmarried male/female candidates born not earlier than 02nd Jan 2007.
qualification: 12th Class pass for Army, Physics & Maths mandatory for Air Force/Navy.
pattern_table:
Subject|Duration|Maximum Marks
Mathematics|2.5 Hours|300
General Ability Test|2.5 Hours|600
instructions: Candidates will be selected based on Written Exam and SSB Interview.
selection_process: Written Examination and SSB Interview (Personality Test).
job_description: Join the Indian Armed Forces through NDA. This is the first step towards a prestigious career as a commissioned officer.

title: SBI Junior Associates (Clerical) 2025
qualification: Graduation in any discipline. Those in the final year can also apply.
pattern_table:
Test|Marks|Duration
English Language|30|20 Min
Numerical Ability|35|20 Min
Reasoning Ability|35|20 Min
instructions: Candidates can apply for vacancies in one State only. LPT will be conducted.
selection_process: Preliminary Exam, Main Exam, and Local Language Test (LPT).
job_description: SBI is hiring Junior Associates for customer support and sales. This is one of the best entry-level jobs in the banking sector.
